MINI MINUTES: Richard A. Hoyer, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff. Kenneth M. Walczak, Esq., appearing for Defendant. The OSC is re-set to November 28, 2017 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-04-2017 Continued To Aug-29-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Apr-03-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Denied without prejudice to being renewed if and when the settlement agreement is approved by the Board of Supervisors. The "Agreement to Settlement Terms" states it is not effective absent approval by the Board, which has not occurred, and thus a motion to enter judgment is premature. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Kelly DeYoung, CSR 6780 (kdeyoung@sftc.org) (302/HEK)
